entry.title: Autonomous Canvas Agents for Text-to-Image Editing Workflows
entry.summary: We study a text-to-image and image editing system where an agent plans multi-step tool use, prompt rewriting, and region-level drawing actions to improve controllable visual generation.

entry.title: Planning-Guided Interactive World Models for Video Agents
entry.summary: We present a video generation and world model framework that supports planning, action-conditioned simulation, and long-horizon control for agent training and evaluation.

entry.title: Recoverable Tool-Using Agents with Deliberate Planning
entry.summary: We study agentic AI systems that combine planning, reasoning, and tool use to improve reliable completion on realistic tasks with better recovery from mistakes.
